Class FormBuilder

java.lang.Object
main.utils.FormBuilder
public class FormBuilder extends Object
Builder utility for creating standardized Swing input forms using structured layout architectures.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FormBuilder(String title)
    Initiates a new layout form container window model wrapper context.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FormBuilder
    addButtonRow(JButton... buttons)
    Appends a trailing horizontal layout panel block containing a series of operation action trigger buttons.
    FormBuilder
    addField(String label, JComponent field)
    Inserts a standard input field into the layout, aligning a description label on the left and the input component on the right.
    FormBuilder
    addFullWidthRow(JComponent component)
    Adds a component that spans across both columns of the form grid layout.
    FormBuilder
    addLinkLabel(String html, Runnable onClick)
    Appends an interactive hyper-link style label at the center of the current row layout.
    FormBuilder
    addRow(JComponent... components)
    Appends a series of arbitrary Swing elements along a single row sequence line.
    JPanel
    build()
    Returns the fully constructed form panel container.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • FormBuilder

      public FormBuilder(String title)
      Initiates a new layout form container window model wrapper context.
      Parameters:
      title - text string used for generating the labeled panel border header outline

  • Method Details

    • addField

      public FormBuilder addField(String label, JComponent field)
      Inserts a standard input field into the layout, aligning a description label on the left and the input component on the right.
      Parameters:
      label - descriptive instruction title string label attached left-side
      field - input or selection swing target component placed right-side
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • addButtonRow

      public FormBuilder addButtonRow(JButton... buttons)
      Appends a trailing horizontal layout panel block containing a series of operation action trigger buttons.
      Parameters:
      buttons - array of operational push button instances added into the form action row
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • addLinkLabel

      public FormBuilder addLinkLabel(String html, Runnable onClick)
      Appends an interactive hyper-link style label at the center of the current row layout.
      Parameters:
      html - raw content string containing the text to display inside the click bounds
      onClick - executable routine action triggered when the link is clicked
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • addRow

      public FormBuilder addRow(JComponent... components)
      Appends a series of arbitrary Swing elements along a single row sequence line.
      Parameters:
      components - array of user interface elements added into the layout row
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • addFullWidthRow

      public FormBuilder addFullWidthRow(JComponent component)
      Adds a component that spans across both columns of the form grid layout.
      Parameters:
      component - component layout target to embed spanning full width
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • build

      public JPanel build()
      Returns the fully constructed form panel container.
      Returns:
      a single populated container JPanel view object target
